name: visual-forge-studio
description: Claude Code plugin for serious image generation and editing workflows using Codex or the OpenAI Images API.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Optional API key used when provider mode is openai or when auto falls back to the OpenAI API.

openai_image_model.title: OpenAI image model
openai_image_model.description: Default OpenAI image model. Use a GPT Image model your account has access to.

openai_base_url.title: OpenAI base URL
openai_base_url.description: Base URL for the Images API.

codex_model.title: Codex model
codex_model.description: Model passed to codex exec when the Codex path is used.

default_output_dir.title: Default output directory
default_output_dir.description: Optional default directory for saved images. Leave blank to save into the current workspace.
